rankings.reason: Best narrative quality; perfectly captures the futuristic, immersive, and high-tech vision requested by the influencer persona.
Strong focus on operational efficiency and modern convenience, though it lacks the creative flair of Option B.
Functional and clear, but the reliance on robot assistants feels less innovative than the immersive tech in Option B.
Weakest narrative; focuses too much on basic language accessibility rather than the requested futuristic, high-tech experience.
